title: Themeing issue - Options -> Theme
author: kmscode
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->

## Expected Behavior
Panel should be themed properly.

vs2015blue (and light) look OK:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16654335/44750983-f4230000-aae4-11e8-89ba-47285a51873f.png)


## Current Behavior
Panel is not themed properly with the vs2015dark theme:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16654335/44750834-824ab680-aae4-11e8-9d51-ac10b822d2ba.png)

Not sure if dracula theme is m...

iterations.description: Theme selection in Options dialog has a display/application bug affecting UI consistency for all users.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Theme selection in Options dialog has a display/application bug affecting UI consistency for all users.
Approach: Inspect ThemePage options panel for incorrect theme preview or apply logic; ensure selected theme is correctly previewed and persisted on OK, reverted on Cancel.
